markets.market_name: Boston Celtics beats Los Angeles Lakers
Golden State Warriors beats Miami Heat
New York Knicks beats Brooklyn Nets
Dallas Mavericks beats Los Angeles Clippers

news.headline: Starting lineups announced: Golden State Warriors vs Miami Heat
news.content: Warriors will start Curry, Thompson, Wiggins, Green, and Looney. Heat counter with Herro, Butler, Robinson, Adebayo, and Highsmith.

news.headline: Starting lineups announced: Milwaukee Bucks vs Philadelphia 76ers
news.content: Bucks will start Antetokounmpo, Middleton, Holiday, Portis, and Lopez. 76ers go with Embiid, Maxey, Harris, Oubre, and Drummond.

news.headline: Starting lineups announced: New York Knicks vs Brooklyn Nets
news.content: Knicks will start Brunson, Hart, Anunoby, Randle, and Robinson. Nets go with Thomas, Bridges, Johnson, Claxton, and Finney-Smith.

news.headline: Starting lineups announced: Boston Celtics vs Los Angeles Lakers
news.content: Celtics will start Tatum, Brown, White, Holiday, and Horford. Lakers go with James, Davis, Reaves, Russell, and Hachimura.

news.headline: Starting lineups announced: Denver Nuggets vs Phoenix Suns
news.content: Nuggets will start Jokic, Murray, Porter Jr., Gordon, and Caldwell-Pope. Suns counter with Booker, Durant, Beal, Allen, and Nurkic.

news.headline: Starting lineups announced: Dallas Mavericks vs Los Angeles Clippers
news.content: Mavericks will start Doncic, Irving, Washington, Jones, and Gafford. Clippers go with Harden, Powell, George, Batum, and Zubac.

news.headline: End of Q1: Golden State Warriors 28 - Miami Heat 25
news.content: Curry with 12 points early. Warriors take a small lead.

news.headline: End of Q1: Milwaukee Bucks 32 - Philadelphia 76ers 26
news.content: Giannis with 14 points in the first. Bucks looking dominant early at home.

news.headline: End of Q1: New York Knicks 24 - Brooklyn Nets 26
news.content: Nets take a slim lead at MSG. Bridges with 10 points for Brooklyn.

news.headline: End of Q1: Boston Celtics 30 - Los Angeles Lakers 27
news.content: Tatum scores 11 in the opening quarter. Close game in Boston.

news.headline: End of Q1: Denver Nuggets 30 - Phoenix Suns 24
news.content: Jokic orchestrating the offense beautifully. Nuggets with a strong start at altitude.

news.headline: End of Q1: Dallas Mavericks 28 - Los Angeles Clippers 30
news.content: Clippers edge ahead. Harden with 9 points and 4 assists in the first.

news.headline: End of Q2: Golden State Warriors 52 - Miami Heat 56
news.content: Heat take the lead! Butler with a strong second quarter.

news.headline: End of Q2: Milwaukee Bucks 62 - Philadelphia 76ers 55
news.content: Bucks extend the lead at the half. Giannis with 22 points already. Embiid picks up his 3rd foul late in the quarter.

news.headline: End of Q2: New York Knicks 50 - Brooklyn Nets 52
news.content: Tight game at halftime in Manhattan. Brunson settling in with 14 points.

news.headline: End of Q2: Boston Celtics 58 - Los Angeles Lakers 54
news.content: Celtics maintain the lead going into halftime. Brown adds 15.

news.headline: End of Q2: Denver Nuggets 58 - Phoenix Suns 52
news.content: Nuggets maintain control. Jokic has 18/7/6 at the half. Booker heating up with 15 for the Suns.

news.headline: End of Q2: Dallas Mavericks 56 - Los Angeles Clippers 58
news.content: Clippers cling to a 2-point lead at the half. Luka with 18 points, Irving adding 12.

news.headline: End of Q3: Golden State Warriors 78 - Miami Heat 82
news.content: Heat extend their lead. Adebayo dominates the paint.

news.headline: FOUL TROUBLE: Joel Embiid picks up his 5th foul midway through Q3
news.content: Embiid heads to the bench with his 5th personal foul. 76ers will need to manage his minutes carefully down the stretch.

news.headline: End of Q3: Milwaukee Bucks 93 - Philadelphia 76ers 84
news.content: Bucks pull away with Embiid on the bench. Giannis with 30 points. Middleton adding 18.

news.headline: End of Q3: New York Knicks 76 - Brooklyn Nets 78
news.content: Still a nailbiter in NYC. Both teams trading baskets. Brunson with 22 points through three.

news.headline: INJURY ALERT: Stephen Curry heads to locker room
news.content: Curry appears to have tweaked his ankle in the third quarter. Warriors medical staff evaluating.

news.headline: Devin Booker catches fire! 18 points in Q3 alone
news.content: Booker is unconscious from three-point range, hitting 4 of 5 from deep in the third quarter. Suns have completely shifted momentum.

news.headline: End of Q3: Boston Celtics 88 - Los Angeles Lakers 85
news.content: Lakers rally in the third! James with 28 points. Game tightens up.

news.headline: EJECTION: Nikola Jokic ejected after second technical foul
news.content: Jokic receives his second technical foul for arguing a no-call on a drive to the basket. Nuggets lose their MVP with the lead slipping away.

news.headline: End of Q3: Denver Nuggets 82 - Phoenix Suns 88
news.content: Suns take the lead! Booker with 33 points through three quarters. Jokic ejected. Nuggets in disarray.

news.headline: End of Q3: Dallas Mavericks 84 - Los Angeles Clippers 86
news.content: Clippers still up 2. Luka with 28 points, keeping Dallas in it. George with 24 for LA.

news.headline: UPDATE: Curry ruled out for remainder of game
news.content: Warriors star will not return tonight. Ankle sprain, severity to be determined.

news.headline: Jalen Brunson takes over in Q4 for the Knicks
news.content: Brunson scores 10 straight points to open the fourth quarter. Knicks go on a 14-4 run to blow the game open at MSG.

news.headline: End of Q4: Boston Celtics 118 - Los Angeles Lakers 112
news.content: Celtics close it out! Tatum with 35 points, Brown adds 28.

news.headline: Joel Embiid fouls out in Q4
news.content: Embiid picks up his 6th foul with 4 minutes left. Finishes with just 18 points on limited minutes. Bucks cruise from here.

news.headline: End of Q4: Milwaukee Bucks 121 - Philadelphia 76ers 115
news.content: Bucks win convincingly. Giannis with 38 points, 12 rebounds. Maxey had 28 in a losing effort for Philly.

news.headline: End of Q4: New York Knicks 105 - Brooklyn Nets 98
news.content: Knicks pull away late. Brunson finishes with 36 points, 8 assists. Dominant Q4 seals the rivalry game.

news.headline: End of Q4: Denver Nuggets 108 - Phoenix Suns 114
news.content: Suns close it out. Booker finishes with 42 points. Without Jokic, Nuggets couldn't recover. Murray had 30 in the loss.

news.headline: Final: Milwaukee Bucks 121 - Philadelphia 76ers 115
news.content: Bucks win! Giannis dominates with 38/12/5. Embiid's foul trouble was the story as Philly couldn't keep up without their big man.

news.headline: TIED AT THE END OF REGULATION: Dallas Mavericks 109 - Los Angeles Clippers 109
news.content: We're going to overtime in Dallas! George hits a contested three to tie it at the buzzer. Luka had a chance to win it but his floater rimmed out.

news.headline: Final: New York Knicks 105 - Brooklyn Nets 98
news.content: Knicks win the crosstown rivalry! Brunson's 36-point masterclass in the fourth quarter puts Brooklyn away. Randle adds 22.

news.headline: Final: Golden State Warriors 105 - Miami Heat 110
news.content: Heat win! Miami holds on after Curry's exit. Butler finishes with 32 points.

news.headline: Final: Denver Nuggets 108 - Phoenix Suns 114
news.content: Suns take it in Denver! Booker's 42-point explosion and Jokic's ejection were the turning points. Durant quietly efficient with 26.

news.headline: Final: Boston Celtics 118 - Los Angeles Lakers 112
news.content: Celtics win! Boston takes down LA at home. James had 38 but it wasn't enough.

news.headline: LUKA GAME-WINNER! Doncic hits step-back three at the OT buzzer!
news.content: Unbelievable! Doncic shakes Harden with a step-back three from 28 feet to win it at the overtime buzzer. Dallas erupts! Luka finishes with 44 points.

news.headline: Final: Dallas Mavericks 119 - Los Angeles Clippers 116 (OT)
news.content: Mavericks win in overtime on Luka's incredible buzzer-beater! Doncic with 44/10/8. Irving adds 26. Harden had 31 for the Clippers in a losing effort.
